introduction.text: Hello, I`m Camila, or “ratamurcielago(ratbat)”, a chilean illustrator focused mostly on Children`s Illustration, I love to portray in an atractive and curious way the chilean identity I proudly have. I work mostly on digital, not because I dislike traditional ways but because I want to be able to do beautiful things for a cheap price and be able to reach every corner of Latino America and the world. I believe in democratization of art and illustration. Nice to meet you!
